content.text:
14个自定义页码需要删除。它们都嵌在长行中，用 PowerShell 正则批量删除最高效。 There are 14 slides with the custom page number at `top:674.0px`. These are embedded in long lines which makes StrReplace tricky. Let me find a pattern that can match them. The pattern is something like: `

XX / 16

` Since the data-name and class attributes vary across slides, I'll use a CSS rule to hide all elements positioned at that exact top coordinate rather than trying to match each one individually with StrReplace. I'm going to use PowerShell to do a regex replacement that targets these positioned elements across all the slides, removing the ones that match the pattern of those score indicators.

input.command:
$file = "C:\Users\016551\OneDrive\Desktop\个人信息相关\转正答辩\转正答辩_v3_动画版.html" $content = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText($file, [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8) $pattern = '
[^<]*

\d+ / 16

' $count = ([regex]::Matches($content, $pattern)).Count Write-Host "Found $count matches" $newContent = [regex]::Replace($content, $pattern, '') [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText($file, $newContent, [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8) Write-Host "Done"
input.description: Batch remove custom page number elements
